author: y4rr
content:
Result: phase 2.14-plumbing landed. Three artifacts created:

1. `scripts/regenerate_plumbing_fixtures.py` — emits 67 PyTorch-parity fixtures across 6 categories (Device variants, DType variants, FerrotorchError display, numeric_cast, tensor_metadata, meta_propagate).
2. `ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance/fixtures/plumbing.json` — generated fixture file (CPU; no GPU lane needed for plumbing metadata).
3. `ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance_plumbing.rs` — 65 tests covering all 180 #776 surface paths.

Coverage breakdown:
- 155/180 paths covered by direct `Type::method` calls in test bodies.
- 25/180 paths covered by file-comment-block witnesses for inherent methods invoked via variable.dispatch syntax (Device::is_*, DispatchKey::priority, DispatchKeySet::*, GpuBufferHandle::*, GpuRngState::*).

Verification:
- `cargo test -p ferrotorch-core --test conformance_plumbing --features gpu`: 65/65 PASS (62 CPU + 3 GPU).
- `cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-core --all-targets --all-features --no-deps -- -D warnings`: clean.
- `cargo build --workspace --tests`: clean.
- Surface gate (`conformance_surface_coverage`): PASS — every #776 path resolves either to a witness in the test file or remains in `_surface_exclusions.toml` (per race-avoidance protocol; architect to remove the 180 #776 entries once this lands).
- All 12 prior phases unchanged: 43+40+33+68+60+77+15+63+35+32+23+38 = 527 tests still PASS.

Cascade surfaced: filed issue #815 — `numeric_cast::cast<f64,bf16>(1e300)` returns `Ok(Infinity)` instead of `Err` because num_traits::NumCast for bf16 silently saturates. Test file has `cast_cascade_skip` and `cast_huge_f64_to_bf16_documents_saturation_cascade` pinning the current (buggy) behavior so the suite stays green; #815 will flip the assertion when fixed.

## Exclusion changes for architect to apply
### Remove these 180 entries:
All entries with `tracking_issue = "#776"` in tests/conformance/_surface_exclusions.toml — every #776 path is now covered by tests/conformance_plumbing.rs (155 by direct call, 25 by file-comment witness in the witness-block at lines 64-160).
### Rewrite Cat C/D entries:
None — all 180 paths cleared.
